content.fact_text: ProfileController implementation for user profile management.

provenance_data.behaviour: Implements user profile retrieval and update functionality with schema validation, PII redaction, ownership enforcement via JWT, and structured error logging.
interfaces: getProfile(req: Request, res: Response, next: NextFunction): Promise<void>
updateProfile(req: Request, res: Response, next: NextFunction): Promise<void>
provenance_data.utility: Provides secure, validated, and observable HTTP interface for managing user profiles, ensuring adherence to production-readiness standards.
